visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long dark hair and large, round-rimmed glasses. She is wearing a black, low-cut top. Her expression is curious and slightly surprised as she looks into the camera, occasionally touching her mouth with her hand. The background reveals the interior of a brightly lit train car, specifically showing the upper part of a door and red emergency indicators. (2) The camera pans down and to the side to focus on another passenger's hands. The passenger is wearing a beige shirt and dark pants, holding a smartphone with both hands. On the phone screen, the Instagram or Facebook Reels interface is visible, showing various short video clips of the same woman from the first phase. (3) The camera remains focused on the smartphone as the user scrolls through the Reels, showing the woman in different outfits and poses on the digital screen. The background shows the green seats and light gray floor of the metro carriage.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 當我在捷運上發現... (2) [Subtitle]: 有人在滑我的 Reels

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator filming herself, 1 passenger holding a phone showing the creator's content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing round purple-tinted glasses and a black low-cut top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a modern metro train (MRT) with yellow grab poles, green seats, and light-colored walls and flooring. Digital displays and emergency buttons are visible near the doors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the continuous, low-frequency hum of a moving metro train, characteristic of indoor room tone in a public transit setting. There is no background music or speech. (2) A clear, two-tone electronic chime (a notification sound typical of train door operations or station arrivals) sounds prominently. The chime has a bright spectral weight and moderate intensity. (3) Following the chime, the audio returns to the steady, slightly muffled ambient noise of the train car interior until the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a coincidental and humorous moment where the content creator notices a stranger on public transportation scrolling through her social media videos (Reels).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a common social media storytelling format 'When I found...'. The contrast between the creator's real presence and her digital presence on a stranger's phone drives the engagement.
